addon.notes:
# New

* Added a new cli command: //ax ah "item" for singles and //ax ah -s "item" for stacks. Looks up the item on the AH and then posts the stats to ingame chat.
* Net Worth now has a blacklist.

## New CLI Command: //ax learn
New command that can be used to learn the necessary packet sequences for storing any item from a Storage NPC.

How To Use:
1. Target the storage NPC you want to register ingame, then do //ax learn (or //ax learn 100) to start recording.
2. Trade 1 or 100 of the necessary item the Storage NPC accepts to the NPC and accept all the necessary menu confirmations.
3. After finishing the interaction, do //ax learn done , this will save the interaction to a .txt file in your addon folder.
4. Share the data with me and I will register the NPCs as a permanent feature.

# Bugfixes
* Fixed several skirmish-augmentable pieces (Telchine Chasuble, Odyssean Chestplate, etc.) that were not being recognized in the augment catalog.
